'''dazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:swishly|swishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swishly|swishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dazhate|dazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dazhatesher|dazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhatesherĂ«m|dazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dazhatero|dazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dazhateshĂ«|dazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhateshĂ«m|dazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidazhatero|gokidazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidazhateshĂ«|gokidazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhateshĂ«m|gokidazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godazhankerom|godazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godazhankeshĂ«|godazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godazhankeshĂ«m|godazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godazhankeya|godazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dazhaterom|dazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhatemu|dazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dazhateya|dazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidazhaterom|gokidazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhatemu|gokidazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidazhateya|gokidazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dazhazhate|dazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dazhazhatesher|dazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhazhatesherĂ«m|dazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dazhazhatero|dazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dazhazhateshĂ«|dazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhazhateshĂ«m|dazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidazhazhatero|gokidazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidazhazhateshĂ«|gokidazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhazhateshĂ«m|gokidazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godazhazhankerom|godazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godazhazhankeshĂ«|godazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godazhazhankeshĂ«m|godazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godazhazhankeya|godazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dazhazhaterom|dazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhazhatemu|dazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dazhazhateya|dazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidazhazhaterom|gokidazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhazhatemu|gokidazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidazhazhateya|gokidazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠzhĂŠte|dĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠzhĂŠtesher|dĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠzhĂŠtero|dĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokidĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|godĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|godĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠzhĂŠterom|dĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠzhĂŠtemu|dĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠzhĂŠteya|dĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokidĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokidĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafzhafte|dafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafzhaftesher|dafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafzhaftesherĂ«m|dafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafzhaftero|dafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafzhafteshĂ«|dafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafzhafteshĂ«m|dafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafzhaftero|gokidafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafzhafteshĂ«|gokidafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafzhafteshĂ«m|gokidafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafzhafnkerom|godafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafzhafnkeshĂ«|godafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafzhafnkeshĂ«m|godafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafzhafnkeya|godafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafzhafterom|dafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafzhaftemu|dafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafzhafteya|dafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafzhafterom|gokidafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafzhaftemu|gokidafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafzhafteya|gokidafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
